name: Boston Carriers, Inc.
summary: Boston Carriers, Inc., through its subsidiary, Poseidon Navigation Corp., owns and operates a dry bulk vessel that transport iron ore, coal, grains, steel products, cement, alumina, and other dry bulk cargoes worldwide. The company was formerly known as Integrated Inpatient Solutions, Inc. and changed its name to Boston Carriers, Inc. in March 2016. Boston Carriers, Inc. is based in Athens, Greece.
